title: 立意 triage report
description: Agent-produced assessment of stale intent specs, validated and consumed by liyi triage subcommands.

version.description: Schema version. Must match the version understood by the liyi binary.

generated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the triage report was produced.

model.description: Identifier of the model that produced the assessments (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-20260514').

root.description: Repository root relative to the working directory. Usually '.'.

sourceSpan.description: Closed interval of 1-indexed line numbers [start, end]. start must be <= end.

verdict.description: cosmetic: no behavioral change (rename, reformat). semantic: code evolved, intent is stale but code is correct. intent-violation: code contradicts declared intent. unclear: model cannot determine with sufficient confidence.

action.description: Recommended action. auto-reanchor for cosmetic, update-intent for semantic, fix-code-or-update-intent for intent-violation, manual-review for unclear.

total_stale.description: Total number of stale items assessed.

unassessed.description: Stale items not yet assessed (should be 0 in a complete report).

impacted_transitively.description: Items affected transitively via the related graph.

source.description: Repo-relative path of the transitively affected source file.

item.description: Name of the transitively affected item.

relationship.description: The related edge that propagates the impact (e.g. 'related:multi-currency-addition').

impact_summary.description: Why this item is affected (1–2 sentences).

confidence.description: Model's self-assessed confidence in the verdict (0–1).

change_summary.description: What changed in the code (1–2 sentences).

reasoning.description: Why the verdict was assigned (2–3 sentences, citable in reviews).

suggested_intent.description: Proposed new intent text. Expected for 'semantic' verdicts; null otherwise.

impact.description: Transitively affected items via the related graph.
